a.xlink:title: Sets input and output meshes carrying data to be mapped.
Method used by partition. Tags vertices that could be owned by this rank.
Method used by partition. Tags vertices that can be filtered out.
Returns pointer to input mesh.
Returns pointer to output mesh.
Returns the constraint (consistent/conservative) of the mapping.
Returns the pointer to boost::geometry::rtree for the given mesh vertices.
Returns modifieable container holding all vertices.
Creates and initializes an Edge object.
Returns the unique (among vertices of one mesh on one processor) ID of the vertex.
Returns modifiable container holding all edges.
Creates and initializes a Triangle object.
Returns modifiable container holding all triangles.
Returns the (among edges) unique ID of the edge.
Creates and initializes an Edge object or returns an already existing one.
Returns the name of the mesh, as set in the config file.
Returns the base ID of the mesh.
Returns true if the given vertexID is valid.
Returns true if the given edgeID is valid.
Allocates memory for the vertex data values.
Necessary before any geom. operations can be performed on the mesh.
Computes the boundingBox for the vertices.
Removes all mesh elements and data values (does not remove data).
Returns a mapping from rank to used (not necessarily owned) vertex IDs.
Only used for tests.
the min corner of the bounding box
the max corner of the bounding box
